testcases.input: s = "abcda", queries = [[3,3,0],[1,2,0],[0,3,1],[0,3,2],[0,4,1]] Output: [true,false,false,true,true] Explanation: queries[0]: substring = "d", is palidrome. queries[1]: substring = "bc", is not palidrome. queries[2]: substring = "abcd", is not palidrome after replacing only 1 character. queries[3]: substring = "abcd", could be changed to "abba" which is palidrome. Also this can be changed to "baab" first rearrange it "bacd" then replace "cd" with "ab". queries[4]: substring = "abcda", could be changed to "abcba" which is palidrome.
